CLI type - no API/DB/UI scans needed. Found 1025 namespaced functions, 2 GitHub Actions workflows
Source tree documented with 8 critical directories and LOC counts
Dev guide written with prerequisites, conventions, test mapping. No CI test automation.
N/A - Monolith architecture, no multi-part integration needed
Architecture doc written with tech stack, module diagram, data flow, deployment info
Master INDEX.md updated with all generated and existing docs, no incomplete markers
Validation complete - no incomplete markers, all 4 generated files verified on disk
